/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/gui_esp32s3_bridge_contract_test.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/gui_esp32s3_bridge_contract_test.dir/gui_esp32s3_bridge_contract_test_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gui_esp32s3_bridge_contract_test.dir/tests/BridgeContractTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gui_esp32s3_bridge_contract_test.dir/backend/QemuController.cpp.o -o gui_esp32s3_bridge_contract_test  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Test.so.6.9.2 -lutil /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.9.2
